description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a hidden .test_template with a script containing `bundle install --jobs $(nproc) --without docs --path vendor`, `bundle exec rake tests`, and `bundle exec rake spec`, assigned to the test stage. Add a `test:puppet7.23` job that uses the `ruby:3.1` Docker image, runs the template script, sets the variables `FACTOR_VERSION: ~> 4.3.0` and `PUPPET_VERSION: ~> 7.23.0`, and executes in the test stage. Add a `test:puppetlatest` job that also runs the template script in the test stage with the default image. Add a `pages` job in the deploy stage using the `debian:stable` image, limited to the `master` branch, that runs `apt-get update && apt-get install -y puppet-strings puppet`, then `puppet strings generate`, moves the generated `doc` directory to `public`, and publishes the `public/` directory as an artifact.
